arts.ttl: Spurs gave everything but fell short - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says he couldn't ask any more of his side after they "fell short" against Leicester City in a "disappointing" 2-1 home defeat.
Tottenham captain Son Heung-min describes his side's 2-1 Premier League defeat at home by Leicester as a "very painful afternoon".
Match of the Day 2 pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given debate whether Tottenham should back manager Ange Postecoglou after their 2-1 Premier League home defeat to Leicester.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ‘now in direct talks’ with player’s agents – Spurs now working on multiple signings
arts.sum: Tottenham are very interested in Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel and are ‘now in direct talks’ with his agents about a move. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports that it is an ‘open race’ for Tel’s signature before the end of the transfer window. arts.ttl: Tottenham make contact with Brentford for striker Yoane Wissa

arts.ttl: Tottenham have initiated talks to sign Brentford player – Spurs could ‘shake up Premier League’
arts.sum: Tottenham have opened talks with Brentford to sign Yoane Wissa before the end of the transfer window. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that Tottenham are looking to ‘shake up the Premier League’ window with a move for the Brentford man.
